query:
INSERT INTO outbox_dlq (
                id, event_id, event_type, event_version,
                aggregate_type, aggregate_id, partition_key,
                payload, headers, created_at,
                dispatch_attempts, last_error
            )
            SELECT
                id, event_id, event_type, event_version,
                aggregate_type, aggregate_id, partition_key,
                payload, headers, created_at,
                $2, $3
            FROM outbox
            WHERE id = $1
